data.title: Events page polish: inline label+button on desktop, mono Luma CTA

data.body: Reviewed cold against plan. Verified: (1) only src/pages/EventsPage.tsx changed (3 insertions, 3 deletions); (2) top Luma CTA anchor adds font-mono utility only — no size/color/tracking change; (3) both free-event and paid-event pair wrappers gain md:flex-row md:items-center md:gap-4 while preserving existing flex flex-col gap-3 items-center base; (4) outer container stays flex flex-col gap-6 for vertical separation; (5) no copy or URL changes — LUMA_EVENTS_URL and CRYSTAL_MAILTO constants untouched. pnpm typecheck clean. Plan intent met. Pass.

Human QA on deploy preview: long labels wrap at desktop and the two buttons don't align vertically because each pair sized independently in flex-row. Plan-level miss — need a shared grid layout so both buttons share an X position. Iterating on same branch before PR merge.

data.reason: Human review of deploy preview revealed alignment + wrap issues; iterating before PR merge

provenance.reason: Human review of deploy preview revealed alignment + wrap issues; iterating before PR merge

data.body: Review cycle 1 PASS. Verified against rework spec in plan 'Review Cycle 1 Findings': (1) outer container className matches exactly — flex flex-col gap-6 items-center mb-12 md:grid md:grid-cols-[auto_auto] md:gap-x-4 md:gap-y-4 md:items-center md:justify-center md:max-w-4xl md:mx-auto. (2) Both per-pair inner wrappers removed — labels and buttons are now direct children of the grid container, so both buttons land in column 2 (vertically aligned) and both labels share column 1. (3) Labels downsized text-subtitle -> text-body and gained md:text-right (right-aligned flush against buttons at desktop, center-aligned on mobile). (4) Button classNames (max-w-xs w-full text-center) and hrefs (LUMA_EVENTS_URL / CRYSTAL_MAILTO) unchanged. (5) Top Luma CTA still has font-mono from initial commit. (6) Copy strings unchanged. (7) Only src/pages/EventsPage.tsx modified (+20/-24). pnpm typecheck passes clean. Mobile-first stacked layout preserved at <768px via base flex flex-col gap-6 items-center. Visual QA at 375px and >=768px remains the human's call but classNames match the plan exactly.

Cycle 2 ask: drop the colon after 'event' in the paid label ('event: email:' -> 'event email:'); bump labels back from text-body to text-subtitle now that the grid layout gives them column space. Will fall back to text-body-lead if subtitle still wraps.

data.reason: Cycle 2: copy tweak + label sizing per user feedback

provenance.reason: Cycle 2: copy tweak + label sizing per user feedback

data.body:
Cycle 2 review: PASS. Only src/pages/EventsPage.tsx modified (6 lines, 3 swaps). Verified: (1) both label

s swapped text-body -> text-subtitle with text-foreground/90 leading-relaxed text-center md:text-right preserved; (2) paid-event copy now 'To host a paid event email:' (first colon removed, trailing colon retained); (3) grid container md:max-w-4xl unchanged (no pre-emptive widening); (4) top Luma CTA font-mono unchanged; (5) Buttons unchanged. pnpm typecheck clean. Acceptance criteria for cycle 2 met.

Cycle 3: top Luma CTA looks sans not mono in preview. Root cause: .text-body has '@apply font-sans text-base' baked in, overriding font-mono via source-order CSS specificity. Fix: drop text-body from the anchor's className and use raw 'text-base' instead so font-mono actually wins.

data.reason: Cycle 3: font-mono CSS specificity fix on top Luma CTA

provenance.reason: Cycle 3: font-mono CSS specificity fix on top Luma CTA

data.body: Cycle 3 review: PASS. Verified db6f980 touches only src/pages/EventsPage.tsx with the exact single-line className swap from the cycle 3 spec — text-body removed, text-base added, all other classes preserved (block max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-12 font-mono text-foreground/90 leading-relaxed text-center underline decoration-foreground/40 hover:decoration-foreground transition-colors). Confirmed .text-body in src/index.css uses @apply font-sans text-base, so the fix removes the actual font-family conflict and font-mono now wins as the only family setter. Host-an-event block, iframe, SectorHeader, and Stay in the Loop section untouched. pnpm typecheck clean. Acceptance criteria met.

Cycle 4: user wants all-caps mono per DESIGN.md tokens. Right utility is .text-body-display (mono + uppercase + weight 100 + relaxed leading + text-sm md:text-base) — explicitly defined in DESIGN.md as 'body-length passages should carry the chrome tier's mono-uppercase identity but read as paragraphs', which is exactly what this CTA is. Replace font-mono + text-base + leading-relaxed with text-body-display on the top Luma CTA anchor.

data.reason: Cycle 4: switch to .text-body-display token for all-caps mono per DESIGN.md

provenance.reason: Cycle 4: switch to .text-body-display token for all-caps mono per DESIGN.md

data.body: Cycle 4 review: PASS. Commit 9df975e modifies only src/pages/EventsPage.tsx (1 line). Top Luma CTA className swapped from 'font-mono text-base ... leading-relaxed' to 'text-body-display' per DESIGN.md semantic token guidance. Verified .text-body-display in src/index.css applies font-mono text-sm md:text-base uppercase font-thin leading-relaxed — matches the cycle 4 spec exactly. Other anchor classes preserved (block max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-12, text-foreground/90, text-center underline decoration-foreground/40 hover:decoration-foreground transition-colors). Host-an-event grid, iframe, SectorHeader, Stay-in-the-Loop all untouched. pnpm typecheck clean. Meets acceptance criteria.

Cycle 5: user said 'just use the mono label font' — switch from .text-body-display (font-thin weight 100) to .text-label (mono + uppercase + weight 500 + tracking 0.1em + text-sm). More solid weight and the dedicated 'label' semantic token they named.
Cycle 5 review: orchestrator self-review. Single-class swap text-body-display -> text-label on top Luma CTA, no other changes. Diff is one line. PR #211 ready for human visual QA on deploy preview.
